channel.title: Axie Infinity on Chasing Dings!
channel.description: Recent content in Axie Infinity on Chasing Dings!

item.title: I'm just here to bring joy and melt your brain.
item.description:
Not necessarily in that order. I have a lot to talk about and I just have to put it down in the blog, and I guarantee both joy and brain melting.

I’ll talk about the NFT and crypto stuff later. I know I promised I was done with it, but the world isn’t done with it so… here we are but who cares about that because FREE REALMS ? IS COMING BACK ???

item.title: Cryptogaming: A Brief Adventure
item.description:
I had the Ethereum. I had Bitcoins and Doge Coin and even Bounce for awhile, but I had the Ethereum to play a few cryptogames. This is what I found.

It’s my feeling the largest barrier to cryptogaming is having to shell out a substantial amount of money before you even know if you like the game. The games I’ve seen are fairly simple and not really innovative, aside from using the blockchain in some way.
